scripts.optimize:3d: mkdir -p assets/3d && for f in assets/3d-src/*.glb; do b=$(basename $f); gltf-transform optimize $f assets/3d/$b --compress meshopt --flatten false --join false --palette false --instance false; done
scripts.inspect:3d: for f in assets/3d/*.glb; do gltf-transform inspect $f; done
scripts.validate:code: node --check 3d-scene.js && node --check sw.js && for f in tools/*.mjs; do node --check "$f"; done && node tools/validate-source.mjs
